creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed thanks.  Next time, please don't submit a port that doesn't 
even work -- yours had tons of Makefile bugs, and patch-ac didn't work. 
So I fixed all the Makefile bugs and replaced patch-ac with a regex, and 
renamed the patchfiles to something sane.  I also made this port CFLAGS 
and CC safe.
